case_title: JOANNE DAVIS VS. JAMIE KIM ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JAMIE KANG, YILAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-23-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-22-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-31-2015

MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-02-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-02-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court orders case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Aug-02-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. However, the Court will dismiss the case pursuant to Government Code 68608(B) if no appearance is made on Aug-02-2016. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Continued To May-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAY-03-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF JOANNE DAVIS is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to FEB-02-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
